title: Thinking in Systems
author: Donella Meadows
content: “Systems can't be controlled, but they can be designed and redesigned.”

title: Extreme Ownership
author: Jocko Willink
content: “Leaders must own everything in their world. There is no one else to blame.”

title: Antifragile
author: Nassim Taleb
content: “Wind extinguishes a candle and energizes fire.”

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
content: “What we choose to focus on and what we choose to ignore—plays in defining the quality of our life.”

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
content: “We can be blind to the obvious, and we are also blind to our blindness.”
